description: Deep admin dashboard for Grafana operators — HTTP errors (4xx/5xx), request volumes by handler, authentication failures, proxy errors, and API health monitoring.

panels.description: Dashboard header — Grafana Admin Errors, Requests & API Health

options.content:
Grafana Admin — Errors, Requests & API Health
HTTP Error Breakdown • Handler Analysis • Auth Failures • Proxy Errors • Latency • API Health Matrix

panels.description: Percentage of all HTTP requests that returned 4xx or 5xx status codes.
panels.title: Total Error Rate %

panels.description: Rate of HTTP 5xx server errors per second. These indicate server-side failures that need immediate attention.
panels.title: 5xx Errors/sec

panels.description: Rate of HTTP 4xx client errors per second. Includes bad requests, unauthorized, forbidden, not found, and rate-limited responses.
panels.title: 4xx Errors/sec

panels.description: Total HTTP request rate across all handlers and status codes.
panels.title: Total Request Rate

panels.description: Percentage of all HTTP requests that returned 2xx success status codes.
panels.title: Success Rate %

panels.description: 95th percentile latency across all Grafana HTTP requests.
panels.title: P95 Latency

panels.description: HTTP error rate broken down by individual status code. Stacked to show total error volume and composition over time.
panels.title: Errors by HTTP Status Code

panels.description: Separate 5xx (server error) and 4xx (client error) rates as a percentage of total traffic. The 1% threshold line marks where operator attention is typically needed.
panels.title: 5xx vs 4xx Error Rate %

panels.description: Top 10 HTTP handlers producing the most 5xx server errors. Helps identify which API endpoints have backend failures.
panels.title: Top 10 Handlers — 5xx Errors

panels.description: Top 10 HTTP handlers producing the most 4xx client errors. Helps identify misconfigured clients or missing resources.
panels.title: Top 10 Handlers — 4xx Errors

panels.description: Login failures vs successes over time. A spike in failed logins may indicate brute-force attempts or misconfigured auth integrations.
panels.title: Login Failures Over Time

panels.description: Authentication-related errors broken down by HTTP status code. 401 = bad credentials, 403 = forbidden/insufficient permissions, 429 = rate limited.
panels.title: Auth Error Breakdown by Status

panels.description: Percentage of datasource proxy requests that return 5xx errors. Proxy errors indicate upstream datasource failures (Prometheus, Loki, etc). Threshold at 1%.
panels.title: Proxy Error Rate %

panels.description: Datasource proxy errors broken down by HTTP status code. Stacked to visualize total proxy error composition.
panels.title: Proxy Errors by Status Code

panels.description: Top 15 HTTP handlers ranked by total request volume. Identifies the busiest Grafana API endpoints.
panels.title: Top 15 Handlers by Volume

panels.description: Request rate grouped by functional API category. Shows which parts of Grafana are under the most load.
panels.title: Request Rate by Handler Category

panels.description: Top 10 slowest HTTP handlers ranked by P95 latency. Identifies endpoints that are bottlenecks for user experience.
panels.title: P95 Latency by Handler

panels.description: Latency percentile distribution (P50, P90, P95, P99) across all Grafana HTTP requests. Useful for SLO tracking and capacity planning.
panels.title: Latency Percentiles

panels.description: Error rate for Dashboard API endpoints (/api/dashboards/.*). Tracks both 4xx and 5xx errors as a percentage of total dashboard API traffic.
panels.title: Dashboard API Health

panels.description: Error rate for Search API endpoints (/api/search.*). Tracks both 4xx and 5xx errors as a percentage of total search API traffic.
panels.title: Search API Health

panels.description: Error rate for Alerting API endpoints (/api/alerts.*, /api/ruler.*). Tracks both 4xx and 5xx errors as a percentage of total alerting API traffic.
panels.title: Alerting API Health

title: Grafana Admin — Errors, Requests & API Health
